summary: Iteration 37: CCTV AI Features Testing - Face Recognition, Object Detection, People Counting, Motion Analysis. Backend: 24/24 tests passed. Frontend: All 8 tabs and AI features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/cctv/cameras returns list (status 200)
Backend: GET /api/cctv/dvrs returns list (status 200)
Backend: GET /api/cctv/faces returns registered faces list (status 200)
Backend: GET /api/cctv/alerts returns motion alerts (status 200)
Backend: GET /api/cctv/analytics returns summary with period (status 200)
Backend: GET /api/cctv/people-count returns date, entries, exits (status 200)
Backend: GET /api/cctv/attendance returns face recognition attendance records (status 200)
Backend: GET /api/cctv/settings returns people_counting_enabled, motion_alerts_enabled (status 200)
Backend: POST /api/cctv/ai/count-people returns success with people_count (status 200)
Backend: POST /api/cctv/ai/count-people returns 400 when camera_id missing
Backend: POST /api/cctv/ai/count-people returns 400 when image_data missing
Backend: POST /api/cctv/ai/detect-objects returns success with objects_detected (status 200)
Backend: POST /api/cctv/ai/detect-objects returns 400 when image_data missing
Backend: POST /api/cctv/ai/detect-objects works with different contexts (warehouse, kitchen, office)
Backend: POST /api/cctv/ai/recognize-face returns success with faces_detected, matches (status 200)
Backend: POST /api/cctv/ai/recognize-face returns 400 when image_data missing
Backend: POST /api/cctv/ai/recognize-face works with branch_id filter (status 200)
Backend: POST /api/cctv/ai/analyze-motion returns success with motion_detected, motion_score (status 200)
Backend: POST /api/cctv/ai/analyze-motion returns 400 when image_data missing
Backend: POST /api/cctv/faces/register returns 400 when employee_id missing
Backend: POST /api/cctv/faces/register returns 400 when image_data missing
Backend: POST /api/cctv/faces/register returns 404 for nonexistent employee
Backend: GET /api/cctv/object-detections returns detection history (status 200)
Backend: GET /api/cctv/hik-connect/status returns connection status (status 200)
Frontend: CCTV page loads with title 'CCTV Security'
Frontend: All 8 tabs visible (Live View, Analytics, Face Recognition, Object Detection, People Count, Motion, Alerts, Devices)
Frontend: Face Recognition tab shows Registered Faces stat, Check-ins Today stat, Register Face button
Frontend: Face Recognition tab shows 'Registered Employees for Face Recognition' section
Frontend: Face Recognition tab shows 'Today's Face Recognition Attendance' section
Frontend: Object Detection tab shows Camera selector, Context dropdown, Target Objects input
Frontend: Object Detection tab shows 'Run Detection' button with image upload area
Frontend: Object Detection tab shows 'Recent Object Detections' history
Frontend: People Count tab shows Camera selector, image upload area, 'Count People' button
Frontend: People Count tab shows 'Today's Foot Traffic' section
Frontend: Motion tab shows Camera selector, image upload area, 'Analyze Motion' button
Frontend: Motion tab shows 'Recent Motion Alerts' section
critical_code_review_comments: AI Vision Service (ai_vision.py): Uses emergentintegrations with GPT-4o for face recognition, object detection, people counting, motion analysis
AI Vision Service: Has robust JSON extraction with 4 fallback strategies (direct parse, markdown code block, any code block, regex extraction)
CCTV Router (cctv.py): All AI endpoints return structured JSON with success flag and relevant data
CCTV Router: Face recognition auto-logs attendance when confidence >= 70%
CCTV Router: Object detection stores results and creates alerts for low_stock/empty_shelf
CCTV Router: Motion analysis saves snapshot and creates alert on security_concern
Frontend AIFeatures.jsx: All 4 AI panels have consistent UI - camera selector, image upload, action button, results display
Frontend AIFeatures.jsx: Each panel has data-testid attributes for testing
Hik-Connect: Credentials saved to DB but no live cloud session (partner API key required) - EXPECTED BEHAVIOR per docs
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created object detection records visible in 'Recent Object Detections' history
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 37 tested CCTV AI features: 1) Face Recognition - register employee faces, auto-attendance via face match >= 70% confidence 2) Object Detection - upload image, select context (retail/warehouse/kitchen/office/grocery), specify target objects, AI counts and categorizes items with stock_level 3) People Counting - upload image, AI counts people and estimates entries/exits/crowd_density 4) Motion Analysis - upload image, AI detects motion/activity_type/security_concern and creates alerts. All AI endpoints use GPT-4o via emergentintegrations. Hik-Connect cloud integration is MOCKED (credentials saved but no live session - requires partner API key). All 8 CCTV tabs working: Live View, Analytics, Face Recognition, Object Detection, People Count, Motion, Alerts, Devices.
